products.name: Repair and Installation Services (Hardware/Software)
products.description: Component repair service refers to the specialized process of Diagnosing, repairing, or refurbishing individual parts or sub-assemblies (components) of a larger system rather than replacing the entire machine. It is a proactive alternative to discarding faulty equipment and is frequently considered a "component" of a broader maintenance strategy, product warranty, or service-level agreement.
